Contents 
  1. Description

Interface CriteriaSelect<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type returned by the query
All Known Subinterfaces:
CriteriaQuery<T>
public interface CriteriaSelect<T>
Abstracts over top-level queries and unions and intersections of top-level queries.
Since:
3.2
